school_address.streetAddress: 1, Surajpur - Kasna Rd, Institutional Area, Knowledge Park III, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201308, India

reviews.author: Zeeshan Ansari
reviews.review_body: A well-rounded, supportive, and enriching environment. I couldn't be happier with the positive experience my child is having here. I must say, the principal and the management is the best I have seen till now after I moved to Greater Noida.

reviews.school_name: Apeejay International School, Greater Noida - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Gopal Krishan
reviews.review_body: My daughter is studying in grade XII. School is doing excellent in all the field especially giving a lot of exposure to children.  Very nicely planned and organised academic programme.  Good effort by all teachers.  I am very greatful to all teachers, coordinator and Principal

reviews.school_name: Apeejay International School, Greater Noida - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Neha Tiwari
reviews.review_body:
School has an amazing staff who used to take care of the children as well as maintain the school atmosphere happy in the disciplined atmosphere which is good for the growth of students.
Sports and activities are awesome, the sports activities are quite frequent and regular. It encourages students to explore their growth in academics and sports both👍👍

reviews.school_name: Apeejay International School, Greater Noida - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Shikha Mishra
reviews.review_body: My son really liked this school. He was always eager to attend classes and enjoyed the company of teachers as well as his peers. The teachers are passionate about the overall development of their students. They are great at sharing the moments of pride they see in your child – their good behavior and achievements. Regular events are organized in the school. The emphasis is on maximum participation.

reviews.school_name: Apeejay International School, Greater Noida - SEC 3, NOIDA EXTENSION
reviews.author: Niharika Mishra
reviews.review_body:
I am deeply satisfied with Apeejay international school, greater Noida.
My child has been studying here in the school from last five years and we have observed very positive changes in him.
Teachers are very supportive and try to enhance the talent of my child.
It is deeply and rooted with morals and ethics, which or inculcated in our children also.
